extDescription.message: Track user actions, monitor errors and prepare prompts to generate bug reports and exploratory testing report

popup_config_subtitle.message: Configure how to generate LLM prompts from tracked data

popup_mode_steps_desc.message: Generate concise step-by-step instructions for reproducing issues. Creates LLM prompt focused on key actions and errors for bug reports.

popup_mode_document_desc.message: Generate neutral step-by-step documentation from actions only. Same prompt style as ticket steps, without errors or unexpected-behavior fields.

popup_mode_full_desc.message: Generate a comprehensive prompt with all tracked actions and errors. Creates detailed LLM prompt with complete user interaction timelines.

popup_tab_scope_hint.message: Select specific tracked tabs to include. Selecting "Include actions from all tabs" hides individual tab choices.

popup_time_window_hint.message: Use actions and errors from the last N minutes.

popup_expected_errors_hint.message: Mark specific errors as expected to exclude them from the generated prompt.

popup_unexpected_behavior_placeholder.message: Describe what went wrong even if no errors were captured...

popup_preview_placeholder.message:
Mode: Steps to Reproduce
Actions to include: 10
Data scope: Current tab only
Estimated report size: 1.2 KB

popup_prompt_confirm_subtitle.message: Review and modify the generated prompt before sending to LLM

popup_configuration_preview_actions.message:
• Will include $1 actions
• Focused on error-related steps
• Concise format for ticket systems

popup_configuration_preview_document.message:
• Will include $1 actions
• Actions only (documentation)
• Same step prompt as ticket mode, no errors

popup_configuration_preview_full_report.message:
• Comprehensive timeline of all actions
• Detailed context for each interaction
• Complete error logs included

popup_configuration_preview_inactivity.message: Includes inactivity gaps longer than 15 minutes.

popup_configuration_preview_user_defined.message: Unexpected behavior description will be treated as an error.

popup_no_active_tabs.message: No active tab found or tab has no ID

popup_no_actions.message: No actions available with current filters

popup_failed_to_trigger_webhook.message: Failed to trigger webhook. Please try again.

popup_no_prompt_to_send.message: No prompt to send. Please generate a prompt first.

popup_password_expired.message: Can't decrypt password. Please try again.

popup_llm_key_expired.message: Can't decrypt LLM key. Please try again.

popup_failed_to_send_to_llm.message: Failed to send prompt to LLM. Please try again.

popup_failed_to_decrypt_password.message: Failed to decrypt webhook password. Please verify your passphrase.

popup_failed_to_decrypt_llm_key.message: Failed to decrypt LLM key. Please verify your passphrase.

popup_llm_request_timeout.message: The LLM request timed out after 5 minutes. Try again or shorten the prompt.

popup_webhook_request_timeout.message: The webhook request timed out after 5 minutes. Check that the endpoint responds in time.

config_webhook_password_desc.message: Password will be encrypted with your passphrase and not stored in plaintext.

config_webhook_llm_key_desc.message: API Key will be encrypted with your passphrase and not stored in plaintext.

config_integration_passphrase.message: Passphrase (not stored, used to encrypt/decrypt your secrets)

config_text_length_limit_desc.message: Maximum characters stored for values, labels and error messages.

config_do_not_monitor_errors_for_URL.message: Don't monitor errors for this URL

config_redact_url_query.message: Strip query strings and hash from stored URLs

config_redact_url_query_desc.message: When enabled, tab URLs, open/reload actions, and network request URLs in errors are stored as origin + path only.

config_enter_llm_key_error.message: Enter an LLM API key or disable LLM integration.

config_enter_passphrase_error.message: Please enter a passphrase to encrypt your LLM API key.

config_enter_webhook_url_error.message: Enter a webhook URL or disable webhook integration.

config_enter_passphrase_webhook_error.message: Please enter a passphrase to encrypt your webhook password.

config_not_saved_error.message: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.

config_passphrase_is_required.message: Passphrase is required to encrypt API key.

config_passphrase_is_required_webhook.message: Passphrase is required to encrypt webhook password.

config_enter_at_least_1_url.message: Please add at least one valid URL

config_select_monitoring_type_error.message: Please select at least one error monitoring type

config_add_ui_selector_error.message: Please add at least one UI error selector
